name: ALAMO GROUP INC
business: Alamo Group manufactures and sells industrial and vegetation management equipment, including vacuum trucks, street sweepers, excavators, snow removal equipment, and tractor-mounted mowing equipment. Products are sold to independent equipment dealers, governmental agencies, contractors, and municipalities. The company also provides related after-market parts and services.

exposures.sentence: We serve end-markets such as infrastructure building and maintenance, industrial construction, public works, land maintenance, agriculture and tree care.

Gradall produces a range of excavators based on high-pressure hydraulic telescoping booms which are sold through dealers primarily to governmental agencies and, to a lesser extent, the mining industry, steel mills and other specialty applications.

Alamo Industrial equipment is principally sold through independent dealers to governmental end-users, related independent contractors and utility and other dealers serving infrastructure maintenance operators and other applications in the U.S. and other countries.
Morbark is a leading manufacturer of equipment and aftermarket parts for forestry, tree care, biomass, land management and recycling markets.

catalysts.event: Finish remaining line installations and increase production
catalysts.sentence: Over the next approximately one to two quarters, we plan to finish the remaining line installations and increase production.
We acquired Royal Truck in 2023, Ring-O-Matic in 2025, and Petersen Industries in 2026.
On January 2, 2026, the Board of Directors of the Company increased its quarterly dividend from $0.30 per share to $0.34 per share.
